prompts.narration_snippet: So what does this actually look like
prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. At the center of a colorful crossroads in a bustling, fantastical town stands a small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, framed by delicate purple eyebrows and a curious, wide-eyed expression. Slung over its shoulder is a teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm. The character looks around at the diverging paths, each road lined with colorful buildings and warm lanterns. The crossroads sign posts are blank wooden arrows pointing in four directions. The atmosphere is inviting yet full of possibility. no text
